{"text":"The heatmap of Profit by Category and Region reveals that **Electronics** in the **Northeast** region has the highest profit at  **$1,053,305**, while **Music** in the **Northwest** region has the lowest profit at  **$9,155**. 

Overall, the **Electronics** category consistently shows high profits across all regions, with a total profit of  **$4,289,603**. In contrast, the **Music** category has the lowest total profit at  **$180,044**. 

The **Books** category also performs well, particularly in the **Northeast** region with a profit of  **$139,932**, contributing to a total of  **$569,278**. 

The **Movies** category has moderate performance, with the highest profit in the **Northeast** at  **$63,071** and a total of  **$254,698**.
